exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: 750 franchised hotels listed with owner entities, locations, addresses, phone numbers

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels Terminated, Canceled, Not Renewed or with Changes in Controlling Interest During 2024
exhibits.notes: Former franchisees. Includes PA, TX entries visible.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by Cherry Bekaert. Balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, 9 notes. Years 2022-2024.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement and Addendum
exhibits.notes: ~56 pages. Includes Shared Facilities Addendum. Standard form FA.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: ~14 pages. State-specific addenda to FA. States include: Hawaii, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, North Dakota, Rhode Island, and others.

exhibits.name: Development Incentive Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Contingent liability note for development incentives.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brand Amendment
exhibits.notes: Optional Restaurant Brand Amendment to FA. StiR Creative Collective program.

exhibits.name: Guaranty of Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Personal guaranty form. Guarantors include principals, potentially spouses.

exhibits.name: Information Technology System Agreement (HITS Agreement)
exhibits.notes: ~23 pages. Governs OnQ system access, maintenance, support. Includes Order Documents and Schedules.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents – Brand Standards
Manual Table of Contents – Restaurant Brands
State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state franchise administrators and agents.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: 8 pages. Covers: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Virginia, Washington.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brands Addendum to Disclosure Document
Lender Comfort Letter Forms
exhibits.notes: ~27 pages. Includes standard and mezzanine lender comfort letter forms.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Single page listing effective dates by state.
